title: pilosella arvicola subsp. cincinnoclada
intro: Pilosella arvicola subsp. cincinnoclada is a subspecies of the Pilosella arvicola plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is also known as False Oxeye Daisy and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Pilosella arvicola subsp. cincinnoclada has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent, due to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
